content: Self-Refine’s task-specific iterative output refinement and Reflexion’s dynamic persistent self-reflection memory can be combined to form a two-layer autonomous improvement framework for LLMs: short-horizon task refinement draws on Self-Refine’s no-training self-feedback, while long-horizon accumulated self-critique from Reflexion’s memory primes Self-Refine to produce faster, higher-quality corrections across similar future tasks.
